creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I was looking into the smokeping port and didn't find any issue with the pid file or the way the RC script handles the process management.

The RC script and the smokeping default configuration both locate the pid file at /usr/local/var/smokeping/pid

Why do you think the file should be located at %%PREFIX%%/smokeping/var/pid ?

Regards,
- rodrigo
